remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target nonland permanent you don't control
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Return target nonland permanent you don't control to its owner's hand.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you cast a colorless spell with mana value 7 or greater, you may exile CARDNAME from your graveyard. When you do, return each nonland permanent you don't control to its owner's hand.
